title: Benefits Screening * Disability Benefit Recipients - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Diverse Populations > Benefits Screening * Disability Benefit Recipients 1 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Refine Results - Select - Disability Benefit Recipients Older Adult/Aging Issues Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF DISABILITY RIGHTS OREGON WORK INCENTIVES PLANNING AND ASSISTANCE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers benefits counseling to SSI and SSDI beneficiaries. Community Work Incentives Coordinators (CWICs) are authorized to serve all Social Security beneficiaries with disabilities, which includes individualized work incentives planning, referral to appropriate vocational agencies, general information about potential health benefits coverage, and other protection services 900 SW 5th Avenue Suite 1800 Portland, OR 97204 Eligibility: Age 14 and older who are receiving SSI or SSDI and are currently employed or considering becoming employed Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-11am and 1pm-4pm Email (503) 323-9159 Get Directions Visit Website More Details DISABILITY RIGHTS OREGON WORK INCENTIVES PLANNING AND ASSISTANCE
